text:
Percy Jackson and the Olympians season 2 has finally arrived onDisney Pluswith the first two episodes available to stream now.

However, in some disappointing news for viewers,fans will have to wait another week for the next instalmentdue to a weekly release schedule, meaning fans will get their next fix on Wednesday.

This brand new season,based on Rick Riordan’s second novel from the beloved best-selling series- the Sea of Monsters - takes Percy Jackson on a brand new adventure into unchartered waters.

Disney Plus teases: "After Camp Half-Blood’s protective border is breached, Percy Jackson embarks on an epic odyssey into the Sea of Monsters in search of his best friend Grover and the one thing that may save the camp — the legendary Golden Fleece.

"With help from Annabeth, Clarisse and his newfound cyclops half-brother Tyson, Percy’s survival becomes essential to stopping Luke, the Titan Kronos, and their impending plan to bring down Camp Half-Blood — and ultimately, Olympus."



Read more:Inside Tantalus's role in Percy Jackson and the Olympians season 2

Read more:Percy Jackson season 2 cast from Nobody Wants This to Lilo and Stitch stars

With season 2 dropping on Disney Plus, the streaming platform has already confirmed plans for a season 3, which is currently in production in Vancouver. No official release date has been confirmed, however it is safe to say it will likely be based on the third novel in the best selling series.

But some fans may be wondering how many Percy Jackson and the Olympians books there are? We have put together everything you need to know.



Within the Percy Jackson universe, there are many books for fans to feast their eyes onto, but it can become a minefield for any newcomers.

When it comes to Percy Jackson and the Olympians, these are the books you can read in order:

In another spin off here is another series in order fans can delve into:

There are of course other books by Rick Riordan, but is appears the current TV series is following the Percy Jackson and the Olympians series.

Percy Jackson and the Olympians is streaming on Disney Plus.

author: Aaliyah Rugg
description: The TV series on Disney Plus is following Rick Riordan's best selling novel series.
